title: hieracium repandulare
intro: Hieracium repandulare, also known as crested hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, Hieracium repandulare is often used as a tincture or infusion, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
